markets.question: Navone vs. Hardt: Match O/U 22.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Mariano Navone and Nick Hardt in the Cap Cana, scheduled for March 10 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 23. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Challenger statistics.
markets.groupItemTitle: Cap Cana: Mariano Navone vs Nick Hardt Match O/U 22.5

events.title: Cap Cana: Mariano Navone vs Nick Hardt
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Mariano Navone and Nick Hardt in the Cap Cana, scheduled for March 10 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Mariano Navone' if Mariano Navone advances against Nick Hardt.

This market will resolve to 'Nick Hardt' if Nick Hardt advances against Mariano Navone.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Steven Fisk finish in the Top 10 at the 2026 THE PLAYERS Championship?
markets.description: This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed player finishes in the top 10 at the 2026 THE PLAYERS Championship tournament, including ties. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No". If final results are not announced by March 21, 2026 at 8:00PM ET this market will resolve to "No". The primary resolution source will be the official results published by the PGA Tour website (https://www.pgatour.com/).

markets.question: Navone vs. Hardt: Set 1 Games O/U 10.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Mariano Navone and Nick Hardt in the Cap Cana, scheduled for March 10 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 11. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
Any first-set tiebreak counts as one (1) game toward the total.
If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Challenger results.
